problem id: 1bea1a7b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  10110001 -> 00000000
  11101011 -> 01011001
  00111100 -> 10000000
  11010101 -> 10101000
  00110011 -> 00000000
  00101011 -> 01000000
  11011010 -> 01010001
  01011010 -> 01000000
  10111101 -> 10100001

query: 10010110
predicted answer: 10010000
